description: Small jaeger with all-dark, gray wings and white belly. Long tail streamers noted.Behaviors: A large (Pomarine) jaeger finished off a meal of Franklin's Gull and flew off to clean itself further off shore. As it flew away and landed, it flushed a previously unobserved (you don't look away often from a jaeger that is 15 feet away as the Pomarine was while eating) second jaeger. The second bird was much smaller, showed long tail streamers and a much more bouyant flight.Call: nonePlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Christian Nunes, Christian Nunes, Chrisitian Nunes
